use_codes.desc: ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS AS A SOURCE OF SELENIUM FOR PARENTERAL NUTRITION WHEN ORAL OR ENTERAL NUTRITION IS NOT POSSIBLE, INSUFFICIENT, OR CONTRAINDICATED

indications.text:
Selenious Acid Injection is indicated in adult and pediatric patients as a source of selenium for
parenteral nutrition when oral or enteral nutrition is not possible, insufficient, or contraindicated.

Selenious Acid Injection is indicated in adult and pediatric patients as a source of selenium for
parenteral nutrition when oral or enteral nutrition is not possible, insufficient, or contraindicated.

Selenious Acid Injection is indicated in adult and pediatric patients as a source of selenium for
parenteral nutrition when oral or enteral nutrition is not possible, insufficient, or contraindicated.

Selenious Acid Injection is indicated in adult and pediatric patients as a source of selenium for
parenteral nutrition (PN) when oral or enteral nutrition is not possible, insufficient, or contraindicated.
